news_headlines.title: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen is stepping down after 18 years
news_headlines.summary: Narayen told investors AI-first products should be Adobe's next billion-dollar business. He will leave once the board names a successor.

news_headlines.title: Amazon's 'sassy' personality style for Alexa Plus has a lot of warning labels
news_headlines.summary: New 'Sassy' personality for Alexa Plus features razor-sharp wit and playful sarcasm. Adults-only and requires additional verification.

news_headlines.title: Anthropic's Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now
news_headlines.summary: Claude gains visual response capabilities including charts and diagrams.

news_headlines.title: Perplexity's Personal Computer turns your spare Mac into an AI agent
news_headlines.summary: Perplexity launches new product to convert spare Mac computers into AI agents.

news_headlines.title: OpenAI's Sora video generator is reportedly coming to ChatGPT
news_headlines.summary: Sora integration with ChatGPT is reportedly in development.

news_headlines.title: Meta acquires Moltbook, the Reddit-like network for AI agents
news_headlines.summary: Meta acquires platform described as Reddit-like network for AI agents.

news_headlines.title: Thinking Machines Lab is partnering with Nvidia
news_headlines.summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab announces long-term gigawatt scale strategic partnership with Nvidia for AI model training.

news_headlines.title: Yann LeCun's startup raised $1 billion for AI world models
news_headlines.summary: Advance Machine Intelligence, LeCun's Paris-based startup, raised $1 billion to build AI world models.
